title: SIMBA
summary: Scalable similarity search architecture for chess decision spaces.
resumeBullets: Built a large-scale similarity search system for chess positions using FAISS and evaluation-aware embeddings.

title: Pharmacy Document Intelligence
summary: Public-safe ML system for semantic retrieval and document decision support.
resumeBullets: Built a transformer-based document intelligence system with retrieval, reranking, and deployable API workflows.
